text: Ado profile: Community, Claude, Code at @AnthropicAI. Colorado; adocomplete.com; 3,151 posts; 1,181 following; 3万 followers.

Ado turned Advent of Claude into a blog post with additional context, resources, and a reordered progression from startup to advanced Claude Code capabilities. Image title: Advent of Claude: 31 Days of Claude Code, a guide to Claude Code features from quick shortcuts to advanced agent patterns.

Ado says when people bring up taste he thinks of a clip, adding that the point has merit while social media lacks nuance. This is a product-craft/taste commentary signal rather than a direct Claude Code product update.

Ado points to a Claude Code postmortem. The quoted ClaudeDevs post says some users reported Claude Code quality had slipped; Anthropic investigated, published a postmortem on three issues, fixed them in v2.1.116+, and reset usage limits for all subscribers.
Ado reacts to a Mark Gurman quote about Apple leadership. Preserved as low-signal visible timeline context.
